patient.instructions:

Start by saying you “keep getting nasty skin infections and chest infections” and this thigh bump isn’t going away. Volunteer: a painful swollen red bump on your thigh started like a pimple and grew over 5 days; you’ve felt feverish with chills for 2 days; cough with thick yellow mucus for ~3 weeks; you’ve had lots of boils since childhood; you’re tired all the time.
